reviews.comment:
Cuando llegué eran las 20hs y no tenían nada de las comidas q ofrecían. Había una sola chica para cobrar que además atendía el check-in del hotel. Por lo q tuve q esperar un montón para que me cobre una sola cosa.

(Translated by Google)
When I arrived it was 8 pm and they didn't have any of the food they advertised. There was only one girl working the till, who was also handling hotel check-in. So I had to wait ages just to pay for one thing.
